items.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $307
items.description: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $294 to $307.
